description: Generic browser-tab scenarios used by the overnight training runner. Chrome internal pages such as chrome:// cannot be scripted by extensions; use regular http/https pages.

open_tabs.name: Power BI Service
open_tabs.purpose: Power BI-specific panel, screenshot, and action-planning context

open_tabs.name: Microsoft Learn Power BI Docs
open_tabs.purpose: Generic documentation tab to validate non-Power-BI page context capture

open_tabs.name: Example Regular Web Page
open_tabs.purpose: Low-risk static page for generic browser-tab smoke testing

generic_context_expectations: capture page URL, title, headings, selected text, forms, links, and visible text
screenshot capture should work on regular http/https pages
action planning may inspect regular pages but should not submit, save, publish, delete, or share without approval
blocked_contexts: other extension pages unless explicitly permitted
